entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
